option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/color_bg_primary" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- 1. Welcome Card --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_accent" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Здравствуйте, Учитель!" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Title1.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_on_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Готовы к следующему уроку?" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Text.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_on_accent" />
<!-- Блок "Следующий урок" --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_card_overlay" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_circle_accent_inactive">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_event_upcoming" app:tint="@color/color_accent" /> </FrameLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="СЛЕДУЮЩИЙ УРОК" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption2.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_on_accent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNextLesson" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="10:30, 5А (Алгебра)" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Title3.SemiBold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_on_accent" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- 2. Navigation Grid (Bento Style) --> <GridLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:alignmentMode="alignBounds" android:columnCount="2" android:useDefaultMargins="true">
<!-- Расписание --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnSchedule" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_calendar_today" app:tint="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Расписание учителя" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="4 урока сегодня" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Мои классы --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnMyClasses" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_groups" app:tint="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Мои классы" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Список классов" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Список уроков --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnLessonsList" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_book" app:tint="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Список уроков" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="План занятий" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Выставление оценок --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnGrading" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_grade" app:tint="@color/color_error" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Выставление оценок" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Ожидают проверки" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Список ДЗ --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnHomeworkList" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_assignment" app:tint="@color/color_text_secondary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Список ДЗ" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Отслеживать сдачу" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Создать ДЗ --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnCreateHomework" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_add_task" app:tint="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Создать ДЗ" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Новое задание" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Аналитика --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnAnalytics" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_analytics" app:tint="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Аналитика" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Успеваемость класса" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Настройки --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnSettings" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_settings" app:tint="@color/color_text_secondary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Настройки" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Приложения" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</GridLayout>
<!-- 3. Atmospheric Visual Element (Нижний блок) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="160dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Академическое превосходство" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="Будьте организованны, вдохновляйте учеников." android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/color_bg_primary" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- 1. Welcome Card --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardWelcome" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_accent" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvWelcomeTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Здравствуйте, Учитель!" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Title1.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_on_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Готовы к следующему уроку?" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Text.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_on_accent" />
<!-- Блок "Следующий урок" --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_card_overlay" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_circle_accent_inactive">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_event_upcoming" app:tint="@color/color_accent" /> </FrameLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="СЛЕДУЮЩИЙ УРОК" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption2.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_on_accent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNextLesson" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="10:30, 5А (Алгебра)" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Title3.SemiBold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_on_accent" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- 2. Navigation Grid (Bento Style) --> <GridLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:alignmentMode="alignBounds" android:columnCount="2" android:useDefaultMargins="true">
<!-- Расписание --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnSchedule" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_calendar_today" app:tint="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Расписание учителя" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="4 урока сегодня" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Мои классы --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnMyClasses" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_groups" app:tint="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Мои классы" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Список классов" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Список уроков --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnLessonsList" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_book" app:tint="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Список уроков" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="План занятий" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Выставление оценок --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnGrading" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_grade" app:tint="@color/color_error" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Выставление оценок" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Ожидают проверки" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Список ДЗ --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnHomeworkList" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_assignment" app:tint="@color/color_text_secondary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Список ДЗ" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Отслеживать сдачу" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Создать ДЗ --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnCreateHomework" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_add_task" app:tint="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Создать ДЗ" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Новое задание" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Аналитика --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnAnalytics" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_analytics" app:tint="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Аналитика" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Успеваемость класса" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Настройки --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btnSettings" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="fill" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_settings" app:tint="@color/color_text_secondary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Настройки" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Приложения" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</GridLayout>
<!-- 3. Atmospheric Visual Element (Нижний блок) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="160dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/color_bg_secondary" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Академическое превосходство" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Headline.Bold" android:textColor="@color/color_text_accent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="Будьте организованны, вдохновляйте учеников." android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.SchJ.Caption.Regular" android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:text="Teacher Home" android:textSize="20sp" />
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/color_bg_primary" android:elevation="8dp" app:navigationIcon="@null" app:title="@string/app_name" app:titleTextColor="@color/color_text_accent" />
<androidx.fragment.app.FragmentContainerView android:id="@+id/teacherNavHostFragment" android:name="androidx.navigation.fragment.NavHostFragment" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:defaultNavHost="true" app:navGraph="@navigation/nav_teacher" />
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottomNavigationView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/color_bg_primary" app:itemIconTint="@color/bottom_nav_color" app:itemTextColor="@color/bottom_nav_color" app:menu="@menu/menu_teacher_bottom_nav" />
</LinearLayout>
